title: helichrysum montanum
intro: Helichrysum montanum, also known as Mountain Everlasting or Mountain Gum, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum montanum lie in its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to soothe digestive issues, alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, and reduce inflammation in the body. Helichrysum montanum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
